_meta.spoiler_policy: The quest name + requirement are visible to the player who drew it (spoiler:false). The CLASS reward is a spoiler (spoiler_class:true) — in chat, refer to it only by box_symbol (unlocks_class), never unlocks_class_name, until that class is unlocked.

fields.name: personal quest name
fields.unlocks_class: spoiler-safe box symbol of the reward class (null if no class)
fields.unlocks_class_name: real class name — HIDE in chat (null if no class)
fields.unlocks_scenario: side scenario number unlocked, else null

_meta.caveats: Cards 513 and 526 unlock a sealed 'Envelope X' reward, not a class. Requirements paraphrased; exact card text may differ slightly.

personal_quests.name: Seeker of Xorn
personal_quests.requirement: Complete 3 Crypt scenarios, then conclude the Noxious Cellar.

personal_quests.name: Merchant Class
personal_quests.requirement: Own 13 items (2 of each slot, 3 hands, 4 small items).

personal_quests.name: Greed is Good
personal_quests.requirement: Have 200 gold in your possession.

personal_quests.name: Finding the Cure
personal_quests.requirement: Kill 8 Forest Imps, then conclude the Forgotten Grove.

personal_quests.name: A Study of Anatomy
personal_quests.requirement: Have party members become exhausted a total of 15 times.

personal_quests.name: Law Bringer
personal_quests.requirement: Kill 20 Bandits or Cultists.

personal_quests.name: Pounds of Flesh
personal_quests.requirement: Kill 15 Vermlings.

personal_quests.name: Trophy Hunt
personal_quests.requirement: Kill 20 different types of monsters.

personal_quests.name: Eternal Wanderer
personal_quests.requirement: Complete 15 different scenarios.

personal_quests.name: Battle Legend
personal_quests.requirement: Earn 15 battle-goal perk checkmarks.

personal_quests.name: Implement of Light
personal_quests.requirement: Kill 7 Undead, then find the Skullbane Axe in the Necromancer's Sanctum.

personal_quests.name: Take Back the Trees
personal_quests.requirement: Complete 3 Dagger Forest scenarios, then conclude Foggy Thicket.

personal_quests.name: The Thin Places
personal_quests.requirement: Complete 6 side scenarios.

personal_quests.name: Aberrant Slayer
personal_quests.requirement: Kill one Demon of each element.

personal_quests.name: Fearless Stand
personal_quests.requirement: Kill 20 Elite monsters.

personal_quests.name: Piety in All Things
personal_quests.requirement: Donate 120 gold to the Sanctuary of the Great Oak.

personal_quests.name: Vengeance
personal_quests.requirement: Complete 4 Gloomhaven (City) scenarios, then conclude Investigation.

personal_quests.name: Zealot of the Blood God
personal_quests.requirement: Become exhausted 12 times (this character).

personal_quests.name: Goliath Toppler
personal_quests.requirement: Complete 4 Boss scenarios.

personal_quests.name: The Fall of Man
personal_quests.requirement: Complete 2 Lingering Swamp scenarios, then conclude Fading Lighthouse.

personal_quests.name: Augmented Abilities
personal_quests.requirement: Purchase 4 enhancements.

personal_quests.name: Elemental Samples
personal_quests.requirement: Complete one scenario in each of the main game regions.

personal_quests.name: A Helping Hand
personal_quests.requirement: Be present when 2 other characters achieve their personal quests.

personal_quests.name: The Perfect Poison
personal_quests.requirement: Kill 3 Oozes, 3 Lurkers, and 3 Spitting Drakes.
